welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to EasyApply!
welcome.content: I'm Kuba and I'll show you how to use the app to manage your recruitment process.

kanban.title: 📋 Kanban Board
kanban.content: Here all your applications are divided by status: Sent, In Progress and Finished.

demoCard.title: 🎯 Sample application
demoCard.content: I added a sample application to Google for you. I'll use it now to show you all the features.

steps.dragDropMobileContent: Hold the card (0.5s) to change its status. After holding, a status selection menu will appear.
steps.dragDropDesktopContent: Drag cards between columns to change application status. Just grab a card and drop it in the right column.

clickCard.title: 👁️ Click on a card
clickCard.content: You can click on an application to see its details...

detailsInfo.title: 📋 Application details
detailsInfo.content: Here you'll find all information about the application: company, position, application date, job offer link, or job description.

detailsNotes.title: 📝 Notes section
detailsNotes.content: Here you can add notes to the application - interview questions, company observations, or post-interview feedback.

listView.title: 📝 Application list
listView.content: Here you'll find all your applications in list form. You can sort and filter them.

addApplication.title: ➕ Adding an application
addApplication.content: Click to add a new application. Fill in company, position, and other details.

cvSection.title: 📄 CV Management
cvSection.content: Here you can add your CVs. Don't worry... all data is saved only in your browser - securely and locally.

cvAddButton.title: 📎 Add your CV
cvAddButton.content: Add your CV. You can upload a PDF, provide a cloud link (Google Drive, Dropbox) or just note the file name.

cvAssignOpen.title: 🔗 Assigning CV
cvAssignOpen.content: You can assign a selected CV to a specific application.

cvAssignModal.title: ✅ Confirm assignment
cvAssignModal.content: Select a specific company and click "Assign" to save the association.

badges.title: 🏆 Badges
badges.content: Collect badges for persistence! Remember... recruitment is a skill, not a one-time test!

finish.title: 🎉 Done!
finish.content: Now you know all EasyApply features. Good luck with your job search! They don't know who they're dealing with...
